entries.title: St. Jerome, Commentary on Daniel, CHAPTER ONE on daniel 1:21
entries.excerpt: Verse 21. "Daniel therefore continued unto the first year of Cyrus the king." In the later discussion we shall explain how it was that Daniel who is here described as having continued till the first year of king Cyrus afterwards held office in the third year of that same Cyrus and is even recorded to have lived in the first year of Darius.
